name: Web Tint
description: Visual filter overlay for any page. Includes night shift (amber blue-light filter), grayscale, high contrast, invert colors, and custom color tint. Adjustable intensity and color temperature. A superset of the former Night Shift module.

version.changelog: Initial release. Replaces Night Shift with multiple filter modes.

configItems.name: Filter mode
configItems.description: night = amber blue-light filter. grayscale = remove all color. contrast = boost contrast. invert = invert all colors. custom = apply a custom color tint.

configItems.name: Intensity (%)
configItems.description: Overlay opacity for night shift and custom tint modes. 0 = off, 100 = full.

configItems.name: Color temperature (K)
configItems.description: Night shift color temperature. 2000 = warm amber, 3500 = soft warm, 5000 = neutral.

configItems.name: Custom tint color
configItems.description: Hex color for custom tint mode, e.g. #ff9b40 for amber.

configItems.name: Contrast boost amount (%)
configItems.description: Contrast multiplier for high-contrast mode. 100 = no change, 150 = 1.5x contrast.
